config.name: cisco_umbrella_logs-latest_transform
config.lua_code:
-- SentinelOne Parser: cisco_umbrella_logs-latest 
-- OCSF Class: Network Activity (1001)
-- Performance Level: High-volume optimized
-- Generated: 2025-10-13T11:58:59.289587

-- Pre-compile patterns for performance
local timestamp_pattern = "^(%d%d%d%d)%-(%d%d)%-(%d%d) (%d%d):(%d%d):(%d%d)"

-- Cached functions for performance
local type = type
local tonumber = tonumber
local os_time = os.time
local string_match = string.match
local string_format = string.format

function transform(record)
    -- Input validation with early return
    if not record or type(record) ~= "table" then
        return nil, "Invalid input record"
    end

    -- Initialize OCSF-compliant output structure with local vars
    local output = {
        class_uid = 1001,
        class_name = "Network Activity", 
        category_uid = 1,
        category_name = "Network & Systems Activity",
        activity_id = 1,
        type_uid = 100101,
        metadata = {
            product = {
                name = "Cisco Umbrella",
                vendor = "Cisco"
            },
            version = "1.0"
        },
        src_endpoint = {},
        dst_endpoint = {}
    }

    -- Timestamp transformation with validation
    if record.timestamp then
        local year, month, day, hour, min, sec = string_match(record.timestamp, timestamp_pattern)
        if year then
            -- Convert to UNIX milliseconds for OCSF compliance
            local unix_ts = os_time({
                year = tonumber(year),
                month = tonumber(month),
                day = tonumber(day),
                hour = tonumber(hour),
                min = tonumber(min),
                sec = tonumber(sec)
            })
            output.time = unix_ts * 1000
        end
    end

    -- Optimized field mappings using local vars
    local action = record.Action
    if action then
        output.activity_name = action
        -- Map common actions to OCSF activity_id
        if action == "Blocked" then
            output.activity_id = 2
        elseif action == "Allowed" then
            output.activity_id = 1
        end
    end

    -- IP address handling with validation
    local internal_ip = record.InternalClientIP
    if internal_ip and #internal_ip > 0 then
        output.src_endpoint.ip = internal_ip
    end

    -- Additional field mappings based on log type
    if record.LogType == "proxylogs" then
        if record.url then
            output.http = {
                url = record.url,
                response_code = tonumber(record.StatusCode) or 0
            }
        end
        if record.UserAgent then
            output.user_agent = record.UserAgent
        end
    elseif record.LogType == "dnslogs" then
        if record.Domain then
            output.dns = {
                query = record.Domain,
                response_code = tonumber(record.ResponseCode) or 0
            }
        end
    end

    -- Validation and cleanup
    if not output.time then
        output.time = os_time() * 1000
    end

    -- Add status code based on Action
    output.status = (action == "Blocked") and "failure" or "success"

    -- Add severity if blocked categories exist
    if record.BlockedCategories and #record.BlockedCategories > 0 then
        output.severity = "high"
        output.severity_id = 1
    end

    return output
end

-- Error recovery wrapper
function safe_transform(record)
    local success, result = pcall(transform, record)
    if not success then
        return nil, string_format("Transform error: %s", result)
    end
    return result
end
